user_query: For fathers greek food filled day, please add a classic american breakfast option.

fields.name: Classic American Breakfast Plate
fields.short_description: A hearty American-style breakfast plate with fluffy pancakes, scrambled eggs, crispy bacon, golden hash browns, buttered toast, and maple syrup.
fields.meal_suggestion: Cook two fluffy pancakes and serve stacked with butter and warm maple syrup. Prepare scrambled eggs seasoned with salt and pepper. Fry or bake bacon until crisp. Pan-roast or oven-bake hash browns until golden. Serve with a slice of buttered whole-grain toast and a wedge of orange or fresh berries for brightness.

ingredients.name: olive oil or butter (for hash browns)

fields.nutrition_note: Provides a balanced mix of carbohydrates (pancakes, toast), protein (eggs, bacon), and fats (butter, bacon). Add fruit to boost vitamin C and fiber. For a lighter twist, use turkey bacon or replace some pancake portion with whole-grain options to increase fiber and reduce saturated fat.

result.reasoning: User asked to add a classic American breakfast to Father's Greek-food-filled day. Day 7 Breakfast entries are the relevant scope; position -1 appends this new option after the existing breakfast items so Father has a distinct classic American alternative among the day's choices.
